description: Size details: * Please do not use the Amazon size chart for our shirts. Otherwise, the shirt may be too small for you. Please refer to the size chart in the picture gallery on the left. In addition, the cut of the shirts is unique. This means that the cut is suitable for both women and men. * To find the right size, we recommend you measure a shirt that suits you. Chest width: from armpit to armpit straight - do not measure the range. Length: from shoulder to seam. Then you can compare the measurements with our size chart and order the right size. If your measurements are between two sizes, we recommend you order the larger size. Product description: * 100% Terivoile Material | High quality texture compared to comparison products * Country of Manufacture: India * Clothing type: classic collar shirt with Hawaiian print | regular fit | unicut * Sizes XS | S | M | L | XL | XXL | 3XL | 4XL | 5XL | 6XL. * Cleaning information: Machine wash regularly | No shrinkage | No ironing required Note: * Do you like this Hawaiian shirt? We also have other collections for him and her in our range. Interested? To see similar products, simply click on the manufacturer name V.H.O or take a look in our shop diplomat15. We look forward to seeing you - Aloha.
